title: PasswordInput
description: Password input with a visibility toggle and an optional heuristic strength meter.

strength.title: With strength meter
strength.desc: strengthMeter computes a heuristic score (length + character classes) and displays it below the input.
strength.label: New password

noToggle.title: No visibility toggle
noToggle.desc: Useful when the app controls visibility itself or it does not apply.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes aligned with the rest of the inputs.

props.label: Visible label above the input.
props.helperText: Helper text. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that marks the input as invalid.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the focus state.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.maxLength: Maximum length. Activates the counter if showCounter.
props.toggleVisibility: Shows the button to toggle password visibility.
props.defaultVisible: Whether the content starts visible on mount.
props.strengthMeter: Shows a heuristic strength bar below the input.
props.strengthLabels: Custom labels for each strength level (i18n).
props.iconLeft: Icon rendered inside the input on the left.
props.prefix: Fixed text on the left of the input.
props.name: HTML name attribute.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted on every value change (syncs v-model).
emits.focus: Emitted when the input receives focus.
emits.blur: Emitted when the input loses focus.
emits.updateVisible: Emitted when the password visibility is toggled.
emits.strengthChange: Emitted when the strength score changes (0–4).
